backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining the backend for Legend X Esports, with in-memory maps for announcements and roster members, and public functions to add, update, remove, and query both collections.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that the NewsSection.tsx heading was changed to 'Today News', with associated file, component, and test references.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-to-two sentence summaries of every frontend source file, serving as a reference for build planning and component documentation.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base CSS file defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Legend X Esports PWA, including meta tags, manifest link, apple-touch icons, and service worker registration script.
frontend/public/manifest.json: PWA web app manifest for Legend X Esports defining app name, icons, theme colors, display mode, and categories for installability.
frontend/public/sw.js: Service worker implementing a cache-first strategy with background refresh for static assets, skipping cross-origin and API requests, and falling back to index.html for offline navigation.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that composes PWAInstallBanner, Navbar, LandingPage, and AdminPanel into the full application layout.
frontend/src/components/AboutSection.tsx: About section component displaying team mission text, a clipped profile image panel, decorative accents, and a four-card values grid with icons.
frontend/src/components/AdminPanel.tsx: Floating admin panel widget with tabbed UI for managing roster members and announcements, supporting add, edit, and delete operations via React Query mutation hooks.
frontend/src/components/AnnouncementCard: Presentational card component for a single announcement, displaying a formatted nanosecond timestamp, title, body excerpt, and a hover-revealed 'Read More' indicator.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders the site footer with the Legend X Arena brand logo, navigation quick links, contact info, and social media icons for YouTube, Instagram, and Facebook.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-screen hero section displaying the team logo, stylized 'Legend X Arena' title, a tagline, and CTA buttons linking to the roster and news sections.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar with scroll-aware background blur, desktop nav links, a CTA button, and a hamburger-toggled mobile menu.
frontend/src/components/NewsSection.tsx: News/announcements section that fetches data via a custom hook and renders announcement cards with loading skeletons, error, and empty states.
frontend/src/components/PlayerCard.tsx: Displays an individual player's avatar, name, and role in a styled card with hover effects, a role badge, and a fallback default avatar image.
frontend/src/components/PWAInstallBanner: A fixed top banner that prompts users to install the PWA, handling the browser's beforeinstallprompt event and providing iOS fallback instructions in Urdu.
frontend/src/components/RosterSection.ts: Renders the team roster section with loading skeletons, error, and empty states, fetching player data via the useRoster hook and displaying each member with PlayerCard.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (anonymous or authenticated) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and persisted identity via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating announcements and roster members against the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Google Fonts and Tailwind layers, defining CSS custom properties for the design system and utility classes for esports-themed glows, typography, and clip paths.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Composes the full landing page by assembling Hero, About, Roster, News, and Footer sections in order.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with esports color tokens, custom fonts, box shadows, border radii, keyframe animations, and enabling typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks project state version 11 with a list of implemented frontend features including brand name styling, hero section layout changes, roster heading updates, animation removals, and UI text/image modifications.
